name: Berserker Axe
overview: This magic weapon grants combat bonuses but carries a curse that forces the wielder into a berserk state.

properties.attack_bonus: +1 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon
properties.hit_point_increase: While you are attuned to this weapon, your Hit Point maximum increases by 1 for each level you have attained

curse.description: This weapon is cursed, and becoming attuned to it extends the curse to you.
curse.unwillingness_to_part: As long as you remain cursed, you are unwilling to part with the weapon, keeping it within reach at all times.
curse.disadvantage: You also have Disadvantage on attack rolls with weapons other than this one.

berserk_trigger.description: Whenever another creature damages you while the weapon is in your possession, you must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or go berserk.

berserk_state.end_condition: This berserk state ends when you start your turn and there are no creatures within 60 feet of you that you can see or hear
berserk_state.target_selection: You regard the creature nearest to you that you can see or hear as your enemy. If there are multiple possible creatures, choose one at random.
berserk_state.action: On each of your turns, you must move as close to the creature as possible and take the Attack action, targeting the creature.
berserk_state.inability_to_reach: If you're unable to get close enough to the creature to attack it with the weapon, your turn ends after you've used up all your available movement.
berserk_state.target_change: If the creature dies or can no longer be seen or heard by you, the next nearest creature that you can see or hear becomes your new target.
